name: Learning Machine
description: Cross-channel memory bridge that persists user knowledge across WhatsApp, Slack, Telegram, Discord, and Teams via an external API.

apiUrl.label: API URL
apiUrl.help: Base URL of the Learning Machine API. Example: http://agno-api:8000

defaultChannel.label: Default Channel
defaultChannel.help: Fallback channel identifier (discord, slack, telegram, whatsapp, teams)
